title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the advantages of living in these different environments, then decide which one offers a better quality of life for a family with children.

script.text: Please talk together about the benefits of living in these different types of locations.
Now decide which one is the best environment for raising a family.
